name: read_guide_info
full_help:
read_guide_info

Description: 
read_guide file

Syntax: 
read_guide_info  [-macros] [-clocks] [-advanced] [-slr_guidance] [-quiet]
                 [-verbose] <file>

Usage: 
  Name             Description
  ----------------------------
  [-macros]        Macro switch to reuse only macros
  [-clocks]        Clock switch to reuse only clocks
  [-advanced]      Advanced switch to reuse only nocs
  [-slr_guidance]  SLR guidance switch to restrict cells in SLR
  [-quiet]         Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]       Suspend message limits during command execution
  <file>           file name

Categories:

arguments.description: Macro switch to reuse only macros
Clock switch to reuse only clocks
Advanced switch to reuse only nocs
SLR guidance switch to restrict cells in SLR
Suspend message limits during command execution
